title: Zanzibari Pancake Stacks with Caramelized Onion
description: A sweet and savory dish featuring zanzibari pancakes topped with caramelized onions and a drizzle of oozy syrup.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together zanzibari, dwholesome, salt, and sugar.
Drop pancake batter by 1/4 cupfuls onto the skillet or griddle.
Cook pancakes for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface.
Flip pancakes and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
While pancakes are cooking, caramelize the onion in a separate skillet.
To caramelize the onion, cook over low heat for 20-25 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Once pancakes are cooked, stack them high and top with caramelized onions and a drizzle of oozy syrup.
